prompt: Fix this bug: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'split' at line 47 in src/parser.py
test_token_expiry is failing: AssertionError: expected 401, got 200. Fix it.
Our API returns 500 errors in production. Please fix it.
The login endpoint throws a KeyError on line 23. Help me fix it.
FAILED tests/test_auth.py::test_login - TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for +: 'int' and 'str'
Off-by-one in src/pagination.py: page 1 returns rows 0-10 instead of 0-9. Fix it.
validate_token in src/auth.py uses `<` for the expiry check but it should be `<=`. Fix it.
Race condition: two concurrent calls to update_balance() in src/wallet.py result in lost updates. Fix it.
asyncio.gather in src/fetcher.py swallows exceptions. We need them propagated. Fix it.
The await is missing in src/notify.py line 19; we get a coroutine object back instead of the result. Fix it.
ENV var DATABASE_URL is being read at import time in src/db.py, so test overrides are ignored. Fix it.
src/settings.py reads BOOL flags as strings: '0' and 'false' both come back truthy. Fix it.
The email regex in src/validators.py accepts 'foo@@bar.com'. Fix it.
Greedy quantifier in src/markdown.py captures too much; the test expects ['**a**', '**b**'] but gets ['**a** plain **b**']. Fix it.
src/upload.py decodes user filenames with ascii; UTF-8 filenames raise UnicodeDecodeError. Fix it.
JSON dump in src/export.py crashes on Decimal values: TypeError: Object of type Decimal is not JSON serializable. Fix it.
src/cache.py: NoneType has no attribute 'get' when the Redis client is unavailable. Fix it.
test_total fails: '3' + 4 in src/cart.py raises TypeError. Fix it.
range(1, n) is used in src/report.py where it should be range(1, n+1); last row is missing. Fix it.

Stack trace:
  File "src/billing.py", line 88, in apply_discount
    total = subtotal * (1 - discount)
TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'int' and 'NoneType'
Fix it.
src/auth.py: when the JWT signature is invalid, we return 200 with an empty user instead of 401. Fix it.
POST /webhook crashes with KeyError: 'event_type' when Stripe sends a test ping. Fix it.
slugify() in src/text.py drops non-ASCII letters entirely; 'kraków' becomes 'krakw'. Fix to support unicode.
The Postgres connection pool in src/db.py is exhausted under load; we never close connections after errors. Fix it.
src/cors.py reads ALLOWED_ORIGINS as a single string instead of splitting on comma; only the first origin works. Fix it.
